title: carex filipes subsp. arisanensis
intro: Carex filipes subsp. arisanensis, also known as the Arisan sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant native to Taiwan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carex filipes subsp. arisanensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in tea form, or its rhizomes are used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
